data.title: About
data.description: 30 years of CMS heritage. 1,000+ websites shipped. One lesson: complexity kills.

sections.headline: 1,000+ websites. One lesson.
sections.subline: Complexity kills. Every CMS we've ever run has eventually buckled under the weight of plugins, updates, security patches, and architectural debt. @webhouse/cms is our answer: start clean, stay simple, never compromise on the developer experience.

sections.heading: Why we built this
sections.body:
We're WebHouse — a Danish software agency founded in 1995. We've shipped over 1,000 websites, 50+ mobile apps, and a decade of enterprise platforms.

Our first CMS was built in-house in the late 90s. It evolved into ODEUM CMS, which powered hundreds of Danish websites through the 2000s and 2010s. We've seen every CMS trend come and go: monolithic, headless, JAMstack, composable, AI-assisted.

The one constant? Complexity always wins eventually. Plugins break. Updates cascade. Security patches arrive on Friday at 5pm. And the developer experience degrades with every abstraction layer.

@webhouse/cms is our answer. Everything we know, rebuilt from scratch. Developer-first. AI-native. Static-first. No plugins. No update treadmill. Just a clean engine that does exactly what you need.
